# Fred Li (李冠乐) · 李佛创投笔记

> Personal website of Fred Li (李冠乐, Li Koon Lok), Managing Director & Head of University Ventures at Gobi Partners, based in Hong Kong. He invests in university spin-offs, deep tech, healthcare & biotech, AI & robotics, and greentech across Hong Kong and the Greater Bay Area, and writes the Chinese-language WeChat blog 李佛创投笔记 (Li Fo Venture Notes).

## Key facts

- Name: Fred Li / 李冠乐 / 李冠樂 / Li Koon Lok; pen name 李佛 (Li Fo)
- Role: Managing Director & Head of University Ventures, Gobi Partners — https://www.gobi.vc/team/fred-li
- University venture funds: Gobi-HKU Fund I (with The University of Hong Kong), Gobi-Redbird Innovation Fund (with HKUST, supported by Hong Kong Investment Corporation)
- Investment focus: university spin-offs, healthcare & biotechnology, AI & robotics, greentech
- Credentials: HKICPA Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Certified ESG Analyst (CESGA), 技术经纪人 Technology Broker (国家技术转移南方中心 National Technology Transfer Southern Center, 2026)
- Education: BBA in Accounting & Finance, The University of Hong Kong (HKU); MSc in Biotechnology, Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
- Career: 15+ years in private-market transactions, operations and turnarounds — Deloitte (restructuring advisory), Ocean Equity Partners (Senior Associate), CITIC CLSA Capital Partners (Vice President), Hywin International (Executive Director), Gaia Group (Group General Manager)
- Languages: English, Mandarin Chinese, Cantonese
- Contact: fred@gobi.vc
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/fredkli
- WeChat official account (公众号): 李佛创投笔记
- Xiaohongshu (小红书): 佛爷

## Appointments & advisory roles

- Vetting Panel: HKSTP Acceleration Programme & ELITE Programme; RAISe+ (HKU, HKUST, PolyU, HKBU, etc.); TSSSU+ (HKU, HKUST, PolyU, HKBU, CityU)
- Lead Lecturer, MSc in Biopharmaceutical Company Development & Commercialisation, PolyU
- Guest Trainer: HKU, HKUST, CUHK, PolyU, HKBU, CityU, MTR Corp, GUIDE GBA
- Founding Organising Committee & Chair of Angel Investment, HKU Super Angel Network (SAN)
- Expert Panel & Mentor, HKUMed Technology Transfer Unit
- ExCo, Federation of Hong Kong Industries (FHKI) Medical Engineering & Innovation Council
- Review Expert, Jingjinji National Center of Technology Innovation (京津冀国家技术创新中心)
- Advisory Committee to EIF IC Panel, PolyVentures, PolyU
- Task Force on the Review of Graduate Attributes for RPg Students, HKBU
- Start-up Mentor & Independent Consultant, BLOCK71 (NUS); Regular Start-up Mentor — HKU, HKUST, PolyU, HKBU, CUHK-Shenzhen
- Industry Advisor, HKFBS

## Site sections

- Home: https://lklfred-design.github.io/fred-li/ — profile, investment focus, latest LinkedIn posts, WeChat deep-dive articles, press & media coverage, FAQ, contact
- Sitemap: https://lklfred-design.github.io/fred-li/sitemap.xml
